name: com.settlemesh/cli
description: Deploy and monetize agent-built apps. One key lets an agent search the tool catalog and invoke any capability (web search/scrape, LLMs, image/video generation, managed SQL database, hosted agents), with usage-based billing and end-user-pays (X-Settle-Payer) so AI apps can charge users per call without building billing.

environmentVariables.name: SETTLE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SettleMesh API key (sk-settle-...). Optional if you have run `settlemesh login` and a CLI session is stored. Never written to the protocol stream or logs.
